listings.title: Marketing Management Trainee
listings.description: What is the Summary of This Position? This role is responsible for managing field activities and ensuring the achievement of product promotion and sales targets. What You'll Be Doing? Monitoring market dynamics, consumer behavior, and competitive activity by leveraging digital data sources, market research platforms, and analytics tools, and preparing comprehensive analyses, Managing assigned projects end-to-end by using digital project management systems, tracking progress, and ensuring successful and timely completion, Supporting the achievement of promotional and sales targets for responsible products during field assignments by integrating digital and physical channel strategies, measuring performance, and providing improvement recommendations, Supporting digital marketing activities, including content management, campaign analytics, and CRM practices, to enhance brand visibility and customer engagement, Identifying process improvement opportunities aligned with the companyâ€™s digitalization vision, supporting the effective adoption of new digital tools in both field and office environments, and collaborating with relevant teams for successful implementation. Which Profile Are We Looking For? Bachelorâ€™s degree in related field, New graduated or max. 1 year of experience in Sales & Marketing, Proficiency in MS Office applications, Excellent command of written and spoken English, Required to have a Class B driverâ€™s license and be an active driver. Nobelâ€™s proven excellence in the global pharmaceutical sector is driven by the dedication and expertise of our people. Since 1954, we have grown from our roots in TÃ¼rkiye into a global pharmaceutical company, thanks to the dedication and expertise of nearly 5,000 colleagues. We operate 5 R&D and production hubs across TÃ¼rkiye, Kazakhstan, and Uzbekistan, and our presence spans 24 countries with dedicated local teams. Our multicultural and multinational colleagues embody our global presence, ensuring that our products reach patients in more than 50 countries. What unites us is our mission: Health for All, Access for All. Every day, we work with passion to improve the quality of human life because at Nobel, every contribution makes a difference. listings.title: Onkoloji PAH Marketing Intern
listings.description: At Johnson & Johnson, we believe health is everything. Our strength in healthcare innovation empowers us to build a world where complex diseases are prevented, treated, and cured, where treatments are smarter and less invasive, and solutions are personal. Through our expertise in Innovative Medicine and MedTech, we are uniquely positioned to innovate across the full spectrum of healthcare solutions today to deliver the breakthroughs of tomorrow, and profoundly impact health for humanity. Learn more at jnj.com. As guided by Our Credo, Johnson & Johnson is responsible to our employees who work with us throughout the world. We provide an inclusive work environment where each person is considered as an individual. At Johnson & Johnson, we respect the diversity and dignity of our employees and recognize their merit. Job Function Career Programs Job Sub Function Non-LDP Intern/Co-Op Job Category Career Program All Job Posting Locations: Istanbul, Turkey Job Description Caring for the world, one person at a time has inspired and united the people of Johnson & Johnson for over 125 years. We embrace research and science -- bringing innovative ideas, products and services to advance the health and well-being of people. Employees of the Johnson & Johnson Family of Companies work with partners in health care to touch the lives of over a billion people every day, throughout the world. Thriving on a diverse company culture, celebrating the uniqueness of our employees and committed to inclusion. Proud to be an equal opportunity employer. And our culture is interconnected by the shared values of Our Credo. Itâ€™s a culture that celebrates diversity and diverse perspectives. It helps employees achieve an effective mix between work and home life and supports their efforts to have a positive impact on their communities. For our friends who dream of a career in many different fields, we are excited to announce that we have officially started the internship recruitment process in various fields within Johnson and Johnson Turkey. Remember; working with Johnson & Johnson can change everything. Including YOU. For more than 130 years, diversity, equity & inclusion (DEI) have been part of our cultural fabric at Johnson & Johnson and woven into how we do business every day. Our commitment to respect the dignity and diversity of all is embedded in our Credo. We know that the success of our business depends on having the best talent in a workforce that reflects the diverse markets we serve around the world and an inclusive culture that values different perspectives and life experiences. We are excited to announce that Janssen Turkey is hiring 14 Interns across different departments. That is why we in Turkey are working to create an inclusive environment where diverse backgrounds, perspectives and experiences are valued and each and every one of our people feels that they belong and can reach their potential. No matter who they are. Main Tasks Will be responsible for supporting the marketing team in Turkey in: monitoring of market dynamics, trends, market share in close collaboration with brand teams & business intelligence, monitor budget reports in close collaboration with brand teams and finance, preparing reports from internal & external databases & presentations & documents based on guidance provided by product managers, preparing promotional materials and conducting agency relations. Should work with either local or global marketing teams and attend necessary meetings (e.g. CVT meetings) and take notes. Qualifications Senior University student (3rd or 4th Grade, preferably 4th Grade) â€“ studying engineering, business administration, scientific sciences and other related areas Experience in marketing and pharma industry is a plus. Familiarity with Microsoft applications (Excel, Powerpoint, Teams) and Zoom Strong communication skills with the ability to discuss any issues with a wide variety of individuals and groups Creative problem solving and strong communication skills Ready to fit for a company which has the agile way of working; which empowers employees to stay a step a head in life and business Motivated to work in marketing and/or project management and in pharma industry. Fluent in English Able to work at least 3 days/week for at least 12 months period #JnJEMEAStudentCareers #JnJEMEAPharmaceuticals #JNJEMEAUndergraduate #JNJIEMEAInternship Required Skills Preferred Skills: Show more Show less

listings.title: Management Trainee (Sales) - Ankara
listings.description: About the job Founded in 1987, Hayat operates in the fast-moving consumer goods (FMCG) sector, serving millions of consumers globally with 16 powerful brands. Hayatâ€™s portfolio includes Molfix and Bebem Natural in baby care; Molped in feminine care; Joly , Evony , and Goodcare in personal healthcare; Bingo , Gleen , Test , and Has in home care; Papia , Familia , Teno , and Focus in tissue paper; and Sholk in pet care. As the 4th largest branded diaper manufacturer in the world and the leading tissue producer in the Middle East, Eastern Europe, and Africa, Hayat employs over 10.000 people across its operations. Hayat operates 21 production facilities in 8 countries , including Turkey, Egypt, Iran, Algeria, Russia, Nigeria, Pakistan, and Vietnam, and manages sales and distribution companies in Morocco, Bulgaria, Kenya, Thailand, and Malaysia. With its global operations structured under three main regions Eurasia & Americas, Middle East & Africa, and Asia Pacific Hayat reaches over 100 countries across 5 continents, bringing its brands into millions of homes worldwide. We are currently seeking a talented â€œManagement Traineeâ€ to join our dynamic â€œSalesâ€ team based in â€œ TR, Ankara â€. If you want to be part of a diverse and vibrant community where your ideas can shape the future of the FMCG industry and your contributions can create a lasting global impact, then Hayat is waiting for you! Why should you apply for H Generation Management Trainee Program? With our H Generation Management Trainee Program, we target to help the selected individuals enrich their talent by offering well-designed training plans, mentorship and rotation programs across departments. These programs are designed to be supported with regular feedback sessions. You can apply for H Generation MT Program, if you meet requirements below: â€¢ 4th grade, fresh graduate or masterâ€™s student â€¢ Have excellent verbal and written communication skills â€¢ Fluent in English â€¢ Eager to learn in a global environment â€¢ Interested in FMCG field and Supply Chain function You can see our next process steps below: Application / Online Assessment Process / Interview / Job Offer As Hayat, we know that success will come as we take action in our journey that starts anew every day. That's why we don't stop, we don't wait, we Make Our Move. Make Your Move today, apply for this opportunity and join us. Looking forward to meeting you! What We Offer You Private Health Insurance Employee Shuttle Service Meal Voucher / Canteen Monthly Employee Support Package (Assortment of Hayat Products or Food Package) Monthly Internet Allowence Baby Diaper Support (For Children Up to) and Diaper Support for 1st Degree Relatives of Employees) 3 Days of Administrative Paid Leave Per Year Heating and Eid Allowance Once a Year Award & Recognition Programs FLEX: Flexible Benefits Program Wezone: Rewards and Recognition Program Seniority Award Support Heltia: Employee Assistance Program At Hayat, we conduct fair and inclusive hiring processes. We do not tolerate prejudice or discrimination based on language, religion, ethnicity, race, or gender. Our recruitment process is solely based on the alignment with the job description, measurable and objective assessments, and competency-based interviews. Get to know us Please visit us at the following addresses for any information you need: https://www.hayat.com/en-tr/ https://www.instagram.com/hayatkimya/ Clarification Text for Employee Candidate : https://www.hayat.com/aydinlatma-metni/aydinlatma-metni.htm Show more Show less

listings.title: Intern - Digital & Marketing Operations
listings.description: Job Title: Intern - Digital & Marketing Operations Department: Digital & Marketing Reporting to: Head of Digital & Marketing at UMG TÃ¼rkiye Location: Ä°stanbul, TÃ¼rkiye (Hybrid) We are UMG, the Universal Music Group . We are the worldâ€™s leading music company. In everything we do, we are committed to artistry, innovation and entrepreneurship. We identify and develop recording artists and songwriters, and we produce, distribute and promote the most critically acclaimed and commercially successful music to delight and entertain fans around the world. About this role: We are looking for a final-year university student or recent graduate to join our Digital & Marketing team as a paid intern (3 days/week) . This role is ideal for someone who enjoys structure, operational problemâ€‘solving, and music. You will work closely with the Head of Digital & Marketing and support the team across daily operations, follow-ups, scheduling, and playlist-related workflows. Key Responsibilities: 1) Operational Support Assist with weekly coordination for the Head of Digital & Marketing, including calendar updates, meeting preparation, reminders, and follow-up actions. Help organize weekly workloads and priorities across the Digital & Marketing team. Track tasks, deadlines, and cross-functional workflows. Prepare short summaries, checklists, and meeting notes as needed. Keep operational processes structured, clear, and up to date. 2) Playlist & Curation Operations Support the update, maintenance, and accuracy of playlists across digital music services. Assist in curating, refreshing, and improving playlist selections based on mood, theme, genre, and editorial logic. Monitor playlist performance and identify gaps or opportunities. Ensure consistency in track ordering, naming, metadata accuracy, and overall playlist quality. 3) Special Digital Projects Support broader digital marketing initiatives and experimental projects. Assist with research tasks, music discovery, competitive analysis, and digital insights. Help coordinate tasks for campaigns, events, and internal projects. Qualifications: Strong computer skills and comfort with digital tools. Basic proficiency with spreadsheets (Excel, Google Sheets). Broad knowledge of music genres and artists from multiple eras. Attention to detail and strong organizational skills. Ability to handle multiple tasks and deliver with consistency. A proactive, positive â€œcan-doâ€ mindset. Proficient in English (written & spoken). Passion for music, pop culture, and digital trends. Knowledge of digital assets, metadata, and digital music services is not required but is an asset Interested? Application process: A cover letter in Turkish or English is required. (AI-generated cover letters will not be considered.) A merged single PDF containing both your CV and cover letter. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. About us: Universal Music Group (UMG) is the world leader in music-based entertainment, with a broad array of businesses engaged in recorded music, music publishing, merchandising, and audiovisual content in more than 60 countries. Featuring the most comprehensive catalog of recordings and songs across every musical genre, UMG identifies and develops artists and produces and distributes the most critically acclaimed and commercially successful music in the world. Committed to artistry, innovation, and entrepreneurship, UMG fosters the development of services, platforms, and business models in order to broaden artistic and commercial opportunities for our artists and create new experiences for fans. Show more Show less

listings.title: Early Career Trainee, Service Business Operation
listings.description: Job Description Summary As an Early Career Trainee in the Business Operations department, you will gain hands-on experience in managing various stages of the installed base lifecycle, from asset registration to end-of-life. This is a 1 year contract Trainee position to be based in Ankara or Istanbul. You will be responsible for entering customer information, warranties, and contracts into the Service ERP system, ensuring timely and accurate billing for all types of services. In this role, you will also support data remediation & updates, contribute to Channel Partner transitions in CRM-ServiceMax, participate in data cleanup, migration, and verification activities. You will collaborate with multiple internal stakeholders across functions to ensure data accuracy and operational efficiency. This opportunity will allow you to develop a strong understanding of service business operations, enhance your analytical and communication skills, and work in a dynamic, cross-functional, and international environment. Job Description Job Description We are seeking a highly motivated Early Career Trainee to join our Business Operations team. This role is ideal for new graduates who are eager to develop a strong foundation in service operations, data management, and crossâ€‘functional collaboration. The trainee will support dayâ€‘toâ€‘day operational activities across contract management, billing, installed base accuracy, data analytics, and customer support while gaining handsâ€‘on experience with key business systems and processes. This is an excellent opportunity to learn the full service operations lifecycle and contribute to operational excellence within a dynamic team. Key Responsibilities Responsible to install base data entry, installed base creation, deletion or modification and provide data quality for assigned area. Support the accuracy of the installed base database by working closely with field and sales teams. Maintain, validate, and update operational datasets, including installed base and contract information. Support data updates in Service CRM Service Max and contribute to seamless Channel Partner data transitions or clean up to drive system excellence. Analyze data to identify trends, discrepancies, and improvement opportunities. Prepare operational dashboards, reports, data files and summaries for business needs. Support the transition of distributors to the Channel Partner Service Max platform through data preparation and cleanup activities. Engage with multiple stakeholders to ensure smooth data and process migration. Participate in standardization and process improvement initiatives and operational projects. Participate in Business Operations activities such as contract, non-contract management and billingâ€¦etc to increase experience. Complete all Quality and Compliance training within required timelines. Adhere to company Quality Manuals, Quality Management Systems, policies, and relevant regulatory requirements. Identify and report quality or compliance concerns and take corrective actions when needed. Required Qualifications Bachelorâ€™s degree in Business Administration, Economics, Industrial Engineering, Statistics, Data Analytics, or related fields. Excellent proficiency in written and spoken English. Strong analytical skills with attention to detail. Solid command of Microsoft Excel (pivot tables, formulas, vlookup functions, data validation). Ability to interpret data and provide meaningful insights. Strong communication and organizational skills. Familiarity with ERP systems, CRM tools, Salesforce or Service Max. Proactive, eager to learn, and comfortable working in a fast-paced environment. Ability to collaborate with multiple teams and manage multiple tasks. Additional Information Relocation Assistance Provided: No Show more Show less

listings.title: Amcorian Internship Program
listings.description: Back to search results Amcorian Internship Program Location: Izmir, TR, 35620 Department: Operations/Production/Manufacturing Full-time or Part-time: Full-Time Job Type: Intern Shift: On site Accelerate the possible by joining a winning Amcor team thatâ€™s transforming the packaging industry and improving lives around the world. At Amcor, we unpack possibility through our innovative and responsible packaging to provide solutions that benefit our customers, our people and our planet. More than 10,000 consumers worldwide encounter our products every second and rely on us for safe access to food, medicine and other goods. We value their trust by making safety our guiding principle. Itâ€™s our core value and integral to how we do business. Beyond this core principle, our shared values and behaviors unite us as we work together to elevate customers, shape lives and protect the future. We champion our customers and help them succeed. We play to win â€“ adapting quickly in an everchanging world â€“ and make smart choices to safeguard our business, our communities and the people we serve for generations to come. And we invest in our world-class team, empowering our colleagues to unpack their potential, because we believe when our people grow, so does our business. To learn more about playing for Team Amcor, visit www.amcor.com I LinkedIn I Glassdoor I Facebook I YouTube Qualifications Continuing in an associate degree program or completing the 2nd or 3rd year in bachelor's programs Continuing education in technical departments such as Chemical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Electronical Engineering, Mechatronics Engineering, Industrial Engineering etc., in associate degree programs Internship insurance paid by the university Interested in the packaging industry Fluent in English Preferably able to use Ms Office programs Strong communication skills, open to learning and development Residing in or able to reside in Izmir Job Description Working within the assigned department as part of the internship project and providing support to business processes. What We Offer Global working environment To be part of dynamic Amcor Team Internship training program About Amcor Amcor is the global leader in developing and producing responsible consumer packaging and dispensing solutions across a variety of materials for nutrition, health, beauty and wellness categories. Our global product innovation and sustainability expertise enables us to solve packaging challenges around the world every day, producing a range of flexible packaging, rigid packaging, cartons and closures that are more sustainable, functional and appealing for our customers and their consumers. We are guided by our purpose of elevating customers, shaping lives and protecting the future. Supported by a commitment to safety, over 75,000 people generate $23 billion in annualized sales from operations that span over 400 locations in more than 40 countries. listings.title: AXIS Internship Program 2026
listings.description:
AXIS Internship Program 2026

Get ready for a story that will make a difference in your career!

AXIS Internship Program is a 1 year internship program where you will learn through experience and discover your potential!

If you want more information about AXIS Internship Program and Life@AXA, you can visit AXA TÃ¼rkiye Career website and follow @axa.kariyer Instagram account.

What is in it for me?

- A real business experience in a global company

- To have oppurtunity to work with managers and learn the business & build functional knowledge

- Involvement in various projects

- Orientation and onboarding program

- Personalized learning experience, coaching & feedback, networking opportunities and community events

- Presentation to Management Committee at the end of program

- Graduation Ceremony

Who can apply?

- 2nd, 3rd or 4th grade student of an undergraduate program or a student of a graduate program at reputable universities

- Able to work minimum of 3 days per week

- Must have valid work permit in Turkey

- Living and studying in Ä°stanbul

- Fluent in English

- Strong analytical skills

- Strong interpersonal skills

- Individuals who are willing to learn and ready to realize their potential!

Application Process:

- Application

- Online Case Study

- English Assesment Test

- Interview

Applying Period:

From April 1 to April 30, 2026

*Applications from candidates who answer all questions in the application form clearly and completely will be given priority in the evaluation process.

Would you like to learn more about AXA?

AXA Group

As one of the worldâ€™s leading insurance companies, AXA serves 93 million customers with more than 145,000 employees in 50 countries. With its mission of acting for human progress by protecting what matters, its people strategy, â€œ Care & Dare â€, ensures that what is valuable to employees, customers, and society is protected with an empathetic approach; by fostering innovation, courage, and a development-oriented mindset. By evolving from a claim payer into a true customer partner, AXA helps people see the future with confidence, not risk; continuously advancing its technologies with a commitment to shaping the future of insurance, fighting climate change, improving access to healthcare services, supporting economic development, and contributing to the production of scientific knowledge.

AXA TÃ¼rkiye

As AXA TÃ¼rkiye, united by the One AXA spirit and recognized for its bold moves in the industry , our culture is built on thinking differently, pursuing innovation, and putting people at the center. Guided by the belief that everyone at AXA has talent â€” each with their own potential â€” our AXA Employee Experience Journey is fundamentally shaped by talent management.

Through our human resources strategyâ€”which we define as a holistic approach to talent, placing the employee at the center of the entire journeyâ€”we provide a personalized experience for everyone.

With practices that simplify, digitalize, and enhance employee experience, we support our people in discovering their strengths, realizing their potential, taking ownership of their development, shaping their work and careers, and progressing confidently with the pride of being part of AXA.

Aligned with our talent acquisition strategy that states â€œ We hire for AXA, not for the position, â€ our goal is not only to meet the human resource needs we search for, but also we grow with people who embrace leadership at every level and shape their own career paths â€” nurturing leaders from within our own organization.

At AXA TÃ¼rkiye, we create inclusive environments where everyone feels they truly belong, regardless of gender, race, age, or other differences. We foster a working culture that enriches diversity and overcomes challenges together; we offer opportunities that allow each employee to contribute to society, the environment, and their own personal development. From the very beginning of our recruitment processes, we adopt an unbiased approach to ensure everyone is evaluated with equal opportunities.

listings.title: Drive4Sales - CCI Field Sales Graduate Program
listings.description:
Start Where Leaders Once Began.

Welcome to the school of sales â€” where Cocaâ€‘Cola Ä°Ã§ecek has shaped generations of field professionals and future leaders.

At Coca-Cola Ä°Ã§ecek, sales is not just a function; itâ€™s a leadership foundation. Many of our leaders â€” including those shaping our business today â€” have built their careers starting in field sales. Because we believe the best leaders grow by being close to the market, the customer, and the action.

Now, itâ€™s your turn to start strong.

Drive4Sales is a development-focused full-time hiring program for senior university students graduating in July 2026 who want to build a strong, long-term career in field sales.

What Does the Journey Look Like?

Phase One â€“ 1-Month Learning & Field Immersion as an Intern

A strong start to your sales career:

-
Comprehensive sales training,

- Hands-on field experience,
- Full exposure to CCIâ€™s dynamic and influential sales culture.

Phase Two â€“ 18-Month Development Journey as a Sales Representative

-
As soon as you get your degree in July 2026 -regarding your performance & compatibility with the position- you can begin your role as a full-time Sales Representative, supported by continuous coaching, onâ€‘theâ€‘job learning, and structured development modules designed to accelerate your growth into a future leader.

Phase Three â€“ Opportunity to Grow into a Sales Executive Role

-
At the end of your 18â€‘month development journey, high-performing talents can step into a Sales Executive role.

-
But letâ€™s make things crystal clear:

- Even if you are not promoted,
you can continue your career at CCI as a Sales Representative and continue to develop & follow the upcoming opportunities.

Who Are We Looking For:

Final-year university students graduating in July 2026;

- Fluent in English,
- Holding a valid Class B driverâ€™s license,
- Passionate about being in the field, engaging with people, and making an impact,
- Curious, driven, and ready to take ownership from day one,

If youâ€™re looking for a place where you can learn fast, grow fast, and step into leadership; know that this is your moment.

What You Will Experience in Drive4Sales

-
Real customer visits, route planning, and product placement,

- Practical training in sales fundamentals, communication, and negotiation,
- Mentorship from experienced field professionals,
- Leadership development, real business case studies, and continuous learning designed to grow future leaders,
- A dynamic work environment where you see how Cocaâ€‘Cola products reach customers across the city.

What Will You Be Responsible For?

-
Daily customer visits, checking stock levels, creating order requests, and driving regional sales,

- Building strong, long-term customer relationships,
- Executing merchandising activities,
- Solving customer issues and ensuring smooth operations,
- Monitoring and coordinating equipment processes,
- Communicating planned campaigns effectively and on time,
-
Tracking field activities and identifying new customer opportunities,

- Supporting market growth, product availability, and sales volume.

Limited spots available!

Turn your career dreams into reality even before graduationâ€”apply now!

listings.title: CHAiNGERS â€“ Operations Leadership Program ( Gebze/Kocaeli)
listings.description:
About this Position

Chaingers: Operations Leadership Program is one of Henkelâ€™s flagship talent programs - a high-impact opportunity for professionals with 3â€“5 years of experience ready to accelerate their careers in manufacturing operations. This role is designed for experienced professionals who are ready to take on bigger responsibilities, deeper operational impact, and a clear leadership path.

Based at our Gebkim Plant, this role enables you to develop deep, hands-on expertise across end-to-end operations, including production, operational excellence, Smart Factory initiatives, digital transformation, and people leadership. You will lead critical projects,

What YouÂ´ll Do

- Join Henkelâ€™s Chaingers Program - an 18-month immersive journey designed to deepen your operational expertise and accelerate your leadership growth.
- Gain structured exposure across key operational areas, including production, engineering, supply chain, quality, lean, strategy and people leadership.
- Lead and contribute to high-impact projects driving optimisation, efficiency, safety, and performance on the shopfloor.
- Contribute to Henkelâ€™s digital transformation and sustainability initiatives through impactful work in manufacturing.
- Earn Lean Six Sigma Green Belt certification and apply it in real business contexts.
- Be part of a global cohort of high-potential talent, working alongside peers from across regions, sharing diverse perspectives, and learning best practices from Henkelâ€™s worldwide operations.
- Start with a permanent contract and competitive package, with enhanced responsibility into a people leadership role upon successful completion.

What makes you a good fit

- Bachelorâ€™s/ Masterâ€™s degree in Engineering (Chemical, Mechanical, Production/ Manufacturing)
- 3â€“5 years of experience in manufacturing operations, production, or plant-based roles (manufacturing/chemical industry preferred)
- Strong problem-solving skills with a hands-on, execution-focused mindset.
- Passion for continuous improvement, process optimization, operational excellence & leading people.
- Strong communication and collaboration skills, with the ability to work effectively across functions, teams, and diverse cultural environments.
- Comfortable working in a full-time, plant-based role at Gebkim Plant. (remote/hybrid work not applicable for this program)
- Fluent in English; additional languages are an advantage.
- Clear aspiration and potential to grow into leadership roles within Operations.

Some perks of joining Henkel

At Henkel, we come from a broad range of backgrounds, perspectives, and life experiences. We believe the uniqueness of all our employees is the power in us. Become part of the team and bring your uniqueness to us! We look for a diverse team of individuals who possess different backgrounds, experiences, personalities and mindsets.

- Diverse national and international growth opportunities,
- Global wellbeing standards with health and preventive care programs,
- Gender-neutral parental leave for a minimum of 8 weeks,
- Employee Share Plan with voluntary investment and Henkel matching shares.

listings.title: Business Excellence Intern
listings.description:
We are looking for a Business Excellence Intern to work in the Customer Value Management (CVM) department based in Istanbul, Turkiye.

Interns in the CVM department support with sales performance tracking, forecasting, competitor and market analysis, research, and incentive calculation.

Why you?

We are looking for professionals with these required skills to achieve our goals:

- Currently pursuing a degree in Engineering, Basic Sciences, or Business/Economics, and expected to graduate in ~1 year,
- Available to work at least 3 days per week,
- Fluent in English,
- Able to work independently and as part of a team,
- Self-learner with high learning agility,
- Strong attention to detail, with critical and analytical thinking skills,
- Proficient in Microsoft Office,
- Preferred qualifications include experience with the following tool(s): Power BI, Tableau.

- Preferred qualifications include experience with one of the following languages: SQL, Python, R.

Whatâ€™s Next?

We are looking forward to receiving your application! We will then have a look at your profile. If we see a match, we will invite you for a screening interview.

Our Company

Boehringer Ingelheim is a biopharmaceutical company active in both human and animal health. As one of the industryâ€™s top investors in research and development, the company focuses on developing innovative therapies that can improve and extend lives in areas of high unmet medical need. Independent since its foundation in 1885, Boehringer takes a long-term perspective, embedding sustainability along the entire value chain. Our approximately 54,500 employees serve over 130 markets to build a healthier and more sustainable tomorrow. Learn more at www.boehringer-ingelheim.com

Why Boehringer Ingelheim?

With us, you can develop your own path in a company with a culture that knows our differences are our strengths â€“ and break new ground in the drive to make millions of lives better.

Here, your development is our priority. Supporting you to build a career as part of a workplace that is independent, authentic and bold, while tackling challenging work in a respectful and friendly environment where everyone is valued and welcomed.

Alongside, you have access to programs and groups that ensure your health and wellbeing are looked after â€“ as we make major investments to drive global accessibility to healthcare. By being part of a team that is constantly innovating, youâ€™ll be helping to transform lives for generations.

Want to learn more? Visit https://www.boehringer-ingelheim.com

listings.title: Jr. Finance Specialist
listings.description:
Did you ever wonder how your phone was made? Or what made the parts and assembled the car you drive? There is a high probability that FANUC was involved!

FANUC is the world-leading provider of factory automation. Our machine range includes a number of Robots, Cutting, Drilling, and Injection Molding machines, Laser, motors and control systems used in automation.

As a global player, FANUC offers the best of two worlds international career opportunities in a family environment and a dynamic company where people are the center of all activities. We manage diverse projects, we are passionate about our work and due to our continuous development process, and we set trends in the international automation industry.

RESPONSIBILITIES

- Data entry for the companyâ€™s statutory books and IFRS reporting,

- Control of related data entries and reporting support

- Team support on workflow requirements

- Providing necessary support for system integrations and installations

- Making defined monthly reports,

- Ensure compliance with internal accounting procedures.

- Perform administrative and other tasks as needed.

QUALIFICATIONS

- Bachelorsâ€™ degree in Finance, Business Administration, Economics and/or related disciplines,

- Finance experience of up to 2 years,

- High energy, detail focused, action-oriented, honest and reliable,

- Open to learning,

- Strong reporting, analysis and follow up skills,

- Highly motivated and eager to participate in a dynamic work environment,

- ERP experience, especially JDE will be preferable,

- Excellent problem solving and communication skills,

- Intermediate knowledge of both written and spoken English,

- Proficient in MS Office applications, especially in MS Excel,

- No military obligations for male candidates.

Additional Details: Fixed-term employment contract with the possibility of extension to a permanent contract.

At FANUC, we celebrate diversity and welcome applicants from all backgrounds. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, or disability.

listings.company_name: Institute of Science and Technology Austria (ISTA)
listings.description: Staj Ä°lanlarÄ± Funded Fellowship â€“ ISTernship Summer Program | Institute of Science and Technology Austria (ISTA) Kurum/Firma: Institute of Science and Technology Austria (ISTA) Pozisyon: Funded Fellowship â€“ ISTernship Summer Program Ä°ÅŸveren Web Sitesi: https://ista.ac.at/en/home/ Ä°lan BitiÅŸ Tarihi: 09.02.2025 The Institute of Science and Technology Austria (ISTA) is looking for highly qualified Bachelorâ€™s or Masterâ€™s students in the fields of Astronomy, Biology, Chemistry & Materials, Computer Science, Data Science & Scientific Computing, Earth Science, Mathematics, Physics, Neuroscience and interdisciplinary areas to apply for the ISTernship program. The ISTernship (â€œISTA-â€ + â€œ(int)ernshipâ€) is a summer program for students from all over the world who are looking to expand their scientific research experience. Every summer since 2013, students join the ISTernship program and work closely with our faculty or a lab member on a short research project. As part of the application, prospective participants choose a research group to work in, and successful applicants agree on a research project with the group leader. Upon arrival, ISTerns receive an introduction to research at ISTA as well as an introduction to the ISTA Graduate School. The program culminates with a research symposium, where ISTerns present their work to peers, faculty, and lab mentors. You can find more information on the ISTernship here. Internships are full-time, compensated, and will be conducted exclusively in English. DURATION 2-3 months between May 15 and September 15. Exact dates and length are decided together with the supervisor. APPLICATION MATERIALS Candidates must be enrolled Bachelor- or Master of Science students (or similar) in good standing at a degree granting institution. They must have completed at least the fourth semester of their bachelorâ€™s studies (before the respective start date). We ask you to upload the following documents to the application portal: â€¢ CV â€¢ Statement of purpose that explains your research experience and the research area(s) you find the most interesting, your motivation for applying to the ISTA ISTernship program, and which professor(s) you are interested in working with. (1 page maximum.) â€¢ University transcripts and diplomas of all degree programs and all years you have attended and/or are currently enrolled in (we recommend to submit these in the original language as well as in English). â€¢ Contact information of 1 or 2 referees FINANCIAL SUPPORT Each successful candidate receives compensation to assist with the cost of living in Austria and travel to and from Austria. EQUITY, DIVERSITY, AND INCLUSION ISTA cherishes diversity in personalities, backgrounds, experiences and thoughts among all our employees. Diversity creates a workplace that enables employees to gain new ideas and insights and that will take science into exciting new directions. ISTA is committed to equal opportunities and social equity, regardless of age, gender (identity), ethnicity, race, social/cultural background, creed, religion, sexual orientation, and physical/cognitive abilities. Please see our Equity, Diversity, and Inclusion web page for more information. The application deadline for the 2025 ISTernship is February 5, 2025. Join our Virtual Student Open Day on November 20!: https://phd.pages.ista.ac.at/student-open-day/?pk_campaign=vsod-registration&pk_medium=ad%20posting The Virtual Student Open Day is a great opportunity to explore our programs and campus virtually, wherever you are located. The program includes a range of live sessions from the Graduate School Office, academics, and students. You can find out about our PhD program, the ISTA research experience, support services, the ISTA campus and much more by attending one of the talks. The Institute of Science and Technology Austria (ISTA) is an international institute dedicated to basic research and graduate education in life science, physics, mathematics, and computer science. Ä°lan Bilgileri/Job Announcement Info Firma AdÄ±/Company Name Volt Lines Pozisyon AdÄ±/Position Name Commercial Support Associate Pozisyon Tipi/Position Type SÃ¼rekli/Tam ZamanlÄ± AlÄ±nacak KiÅŸi SayÄ±sÄ±/Number of Employee to be Recruited Ä°ÅŸ AlanlarÄ±/Fields AdayÄ±n Ã‡alÄ±ÅŸacaÄŸÄ± Åehir / City Ä°stanbul(Asya) Ä°stanbul(Avr.) Ä°ÅŸ TanÄ±mÄ± ve Genel Nitelikler /Job Description and General Qualifications Join us and be a part of shaping the future of urban mobility! Some complain about traffic but some are actually doing something about it. Join us on our mission to reduce traffic in Istanbul by increasing the accessibility of sustainable shared mobility. Who are we? Volt Lines is the only technology-enabled player in the Turkish market competing against legacy incumbents and it reduces emissions and traffic by turning premium 16-seater buses into a viable alternative to single occupancy vehicles. What we do? In Istanbul, over 50,000 buses operate at 31% efficiency. These buses, which contribute to the city's traffic with empty seats, could also be the solution to its problem. Volt Lines is the only shuttle service provider that has both software as well as a transport service. This allows for optimal harmonization of the software and operation resulting in the creation of great experiences and services. Notable examples of these innovative services include DRT and Marketplace. DRT (short for Demand-Responsive Transport) was covered by a Harvard Business School case study that is being taught at the MBA school. Marketplace on the other hand allows companies to sell empty seats on their buses to neighboring passengers who are going in the same direction at the same time. Let's work together to shape the future of mobility. We're looking for a Commercial Support Associate to join us in shaping the future of urban transportation using the latest technologies. Responsibilities 1. Growth: Sales & Pipeline Support - Drive top-of-funnel growth through cold calling and outbound outreach. - Manage initial contact and qualification calls to bridge the gap between "prospect" and "opportunity," ensuring a steady flow of scheduled meetings for the leadership. - Maintain accurate CRM data to support reliable forecasting. - Support Commercial Managers with pitch preparation, follow-ups, and sales materials. 2. Retention: Account Support - Act as the main contact for routine client inquiries and provide quick resolutions. - Manage customer requests end-to-end and coordinate with internal teams. - Support Account Managers with ticket updates and service changes. - Identify and escalate commercial risks early. 3. Commercial & Administrative Control - Support contract documentation and approval workflows. - Assist with renewal data collection and invoicing checks. - Prepare reports on pipeline health, customer activity, and support trends. - Ensure accuracy of commercial data across systems. Requirements - Bachelorâ€™s degree in Business Administration, Eco

Weâ€™re looking for enthusiastic and driven 4th-year university students to join our Data Science team as summer interns! As a Data Science Intern at Peak, you will have the opportunity to work closely with experienced professionals in the field, gaining valuable hands-on experience and contributing to real-world projects in the mobile gaming industry. What youâ€™ll do during your internship Analyze data from sources like player behavior, in-game metrics, and market trends Develop predictive models, machine learning algorithms, and data-driven solutions Conduct exploratory analysis to uncover insights and guide strategy Support A/B testing, cohort analysis, and user segmentation Create dashboards and reports to share findings with stakeholders Experiment with new tools and techniques in data science and analytics Youâ€™ll need to Be currently enrolled in university in your 4th year of studies Have a schedule that allows you to work in Peak office for 2 months full-time during summer 2025 Have strong passion for data science, analytics, and its applications in the gaming industry Have personal projects related to data science or data analytics, which demonstrate practical skills and creativity, is a plus Hiring process The internship period will be between July 1st and August 29th, 2025. Once you have been selected, you will get a technical assignment through HackerRank to assess your engineering skills. Following your assessments the next steps will be: Online HR & Tech interview Online final interview Last day to apply is February 2nd. We hope to hear from you soon! APPLY

Ä°ÅŸ TanÄ±mÄ± ve Genel Nitelikler /Job Description and General Qualifications Hiroo is an innovative HR Tech startup building a next-generation platform for companies to source, track, assess, and hire top talent. Our product combines an Applicant Tracking System (ATS), a Talent CRM, and an advanced Assessment Module, all designed to help teams hire smarter and faster. We're looking for a sharp, multi-tasking CEO Office Intern to work directly with one of our co-founders. This isn't a one-function role. One day you'll be researching a competitor, the next you'll be drafting content, testing a feature, or helping prepare for an important meeting. You'll be the person who makes things happen behind the scenes, and sometimes right in the middle of them. What You'll Do - Support one of our co-founders with day-to-day tasks: scheduling, follow-ups, prep work - Work across product, design, content, research, and operations - Craft decks, visuals, and written materials - Test features and share sharp, honest feedback - Research competitors, markets, and trends - Curious about AI tools and how to use them to get things done faster Who You Are - 4th year student or fresh graduate in an Engineering department - Remote-first mindset: you work independently, manage your own time, and deliver without being chased - Responsive and reachable, async work is your default, but you're available when it matters - You move fast and you ship things - You own every task that lands on your plate, no matter what it is - You thrive in ambiguity instead of freezing in it - Strong communication skills are a must, we value how you express yourself as much as how you think - Whether it's Claude AI, ChatGPT, YouTube, Reddit, or a cold call, you'll find the answer - Startup DNA: curious, independent, responsible, resourceful - Comfortable supporting a co-founder directly: scheduling, prep, follow-ups. You see that as learning, not busywork. - Open to learning and growing, especially around AI tools and new ways of working - Fluent in English and Turkish - You're here to build real things, not to fill a line on a resume What You'll Gain - Part-time role with real responsibilities from day one - Direct exposure to how a B2B SaaS product is built and grown - Mentorship from the founder across product, design, and strategy - A front-row seat to startup building, the real version, not the textbook one - A collaborative, fast-paced, and learning-focused culture Join us at Hiroo and grow faster than you thought possible. listings.title: Summer Intern, Big Data Platform Engineer | Peak
listings.description: Staj Ä°lanlarÄ± Summer Intern, Big Data Platform Engineer | Peak Kurum/Firma: Peak Pozisyon: Summer Intern, Big Data Platform Engineer Ä°ÅŸveren Web Sitesi: https://peak.com/ Ä°lan BitiÅŸ Tarihi: 02.02.2025 Are you eager to tackle complex data engineering challenges and further develop your skills? We are seeking motivated interns to join our Big Data Team in Peak office for a 2 months summer internship. At Peak, data is the backbone of our operations â€“ terabytes flowing in and billions of events happening on a daily basis. Our Big Data Engineering Team is responsible for building end-to-end data pipelines and delivering the processed data to the target services so that our Business Intelligence team can enable everyone to generate actionable insights. As a Big Data Engineering Intern, you will also participate in the team with your work on our Open Source Projects and have the opportunity to distinguish yourself as an open source contributor. What youâ€™ll do during your internship Support the team in designing and building data processing architecture in the cloud Perform effectively both independently and as part of a team that loves to deploy best practices Learn how to build an automated and scalable data pipeline Involve in ongoing projects and be part of a dynamic environment Participate in weekly planning and review meetings Develop strong engineering skills and programming fundamentals Work with multiple tasks that need strong analytical and problem-solving skills with an attention to detail Youâ€™ll need to Be currently enrolled in university in your 3rd or 4th year of Computer Science / Computer Engineering or a related field of studies Have a schedule that allows you to work in Peak office for 2 months full-time during summer 2025 Ready to use the academic knowledge in a fast-paced, real hands-on environment Have a real passion for software engineering, as demonstrated by previous internships, work experience or projects Have a deep understanding of data structures, in particular how they are implemented and how to apply them to solve problems Great attitude towards learning new skills and applying them in projects Prior experience with Python and Go will be an advantage Hiring process The internship period will be between July 1st and August 29th, 2025. Once you have been selected, you will get a technical assignment through HackerRank to assess your engineering skills. Following your assessments the next steps will be: Online HR & Tech interview Online final interview Last day to apply is February 2nd. We hope to hear from you soon! APPLY

Ä°lan Bilgileri/Job Announcement Info Firma AdÄ±/Company Name Volt Lines Pozisyon AdÄ±/Position Name Solution Center Agent (Part-Time) Pozisyon Tipi/Position Type YarÄ± ZamanlÄ± AlÄ±nacak KiÅŸi SayÄ±sÄ±/Number of Employee to be Recruited Ä°ÅŸ AlanlarÄ±/Fields AdayÄ±n Ã‡alÄ±ÅŸacaÄŸÄ± Åehir / City Ä°stanbul(Asya) Ä°stanbul(Avr.) Ä°ÅŸ TanÄ±mÄ± ve Genel Nitelikler /Job Description and General Qualifications Join us and be a part of shaping the future of urban mobility! Some complain about traffic but some are actually doing something about it. Join us on our mission to reduce traffic in Istanbul by increasing the accessibility of sustainable shared mobility. Who are we? Volt Lines is the only technology-enabled player in the Turkish market competing against legacy incumbents and it reduces emissions and traffic by turning premium 16-seater buses into a viable alternative to single occupancy vehicles. What we do? In Istanbul, over 50,000 buses operate at 31% efficiency. These buses, which contribute to the city's traffic with empty seats, could also be the solution to its problem. Volt Lines is the only shuttle service provider that has both software as well as a transport service. This allows for optimal harmonization of the software and operation resulting in the creation of great experiences and services. Notable examples of these innovative services include DRT and Marketplace. DRT (short for Demand-Responsive Transport) was covered by a Harvard Business School case study that is being taught at the MBA school. Marketplace on the other hand allows companies to sell empty seats on their buses to neighboring passengers who are going in the same direction at the same time. Let's work together to shape the future of mobility. We're looking for Solution Center Associates (Part-time) to join us in shaping the future of urban transportation using the latest technologies. Responsibilities Customer Support - Update passenger records on the platform based on customer requests (adding/removing passengers). - Organize and record service time and route changes. - Resolve day-to-day passenger and shuttle-related issues quickly and effectively. - Record and categorize complaints using the internal ticketing system. - Coordinate with relevant teams to develop and execute resolution plans. - Follow up with customers to confirm satisfaction and closure. - Analyze recurring complaints and recommend process improvements. Driver Support - Conduct orientation training for newly onboarded drivers. - Forward driver/vendor inquiries and complaints from the call center to relevant teams. - Deliver refresher training for existing drivers when necessary. - Follow up with the drivers on missing/expired documents. Sales Support - Make outbound calls to potential clients to introduce Volt Lines' products and services. - Analyze customer needs during conversations and refer qualified leads to the sales team. Requirements - 3rd or 4th year undergraduate student

Ä°ÅŸ TanÄ±mÄ± ve Genel Nitelikler /Job Description and General Qualifications The Trade Council at the Royal Danish Consulate General in Istanbul is looking for skilled, motivated and energetic graduate-level student assistant to join our Trade Council team in 2026- 2027 specifically working at energy, water and environment sectors. At The Trade Council, we provide one-on-one consultancy services to the Danish business community, working both with companies already established here and those looking to expand their activities to Turkey. We also engage in public diplomacy activities to promote Danish values, competencies and experiences through social media, technical workshops, PR and advocacy activities. Our student assistants play a key role in realizing these ambitions. Student assistants in the Trade Council therefore need to be dynamic team players with a real interest in international business and communication. The right candidate will see this job as a unique opportunity to gain valuable professional experience working on trade and as part of an international team. Tasks and responsibilities will constantly be changing. We therefore expect student assistants to be flexible, responsible and attentive to detail. The pace of work is often high, deadlines short and none of it reasons to deliver anything short of excellent work â€“ whether it is contributing to a critical report to a Danish company or performing administrative and clerical tasks. Recurrent responsibilities include making meeting arrangements, preparing social media content, supporting The Trade Council team on market research and outreach activities to local companies and authorities. âœ“ We offer an exciting and international workplace, where the working hours are flexible but amount to 24 hours a week (three full days). âœ“ Student assistants are offered a one-year paid contract. âœ“ The working language is English (Turkish is expected by default). To perform well, we expect applicants to have a good command of English, both orally and in writing. âœ“ Applicants with an educational background within trade, international relations and business administration are encouraged to apply. A passion for sustainability, renewable energy and climate and environment related issues is a definite asset. âœ“ Graduate level, master students are preferred (Senior level students can apply too). For more information on The Trade Council please visit www.um.dk/da/eksportraadet/ and tyrkiet.um.dk or follow us on social media: https://linktr.ee/denmarkinistanbul CV and motivation letter (in English) should be emailed to isthktjob@um.dk no later than 27th of February 2026. listings.description: Cold Chain Logistics & Claims Customer Experience Intern (6 months) You've seen us everywhere, from a road trip, passing over one of our trucks, to the biggest ports in the planet where we touch land to continue our journey All The Way to your front door. Now it's your chance to get to know us from within a workplace full of warmth, friendship and support. We invite you to join our wonderful team and be part of our purpose: Improving life for all by integrating the world. Join us and play an important role on our team lifting global trade every day! Key Responsibilities Supports the Cargo Claims team in delivering a positive and professional customer experience Gets involved in the end-to-end cargo claims lifecycle by coordinating closely with customers and relevant internal stakeholders Supports cargo claims specialists with survey organization, system updates, documentation follow-up, and reporting Handles and follows up on cargo claims queries in a timely and structured manner Builds effective working relationships with key stakeholders, including local, regional, and global claims teams Develops a solid understanding of customersâ€™ business drivers, needs, and service expectations Supports Cold Chain Logistics (CCL) operations by assisting with coordination, follow-up, and issue tracking across relevant shipments Gains exposure to reefer operational processes and collaborates with internal teams to support smooth execution and customer communication in CCL-related cases We are looking for: New graduates open to internship opportunities, or 4th-year undergraduate students available to work a minimum of 4 days per week for 6 months Agility & capability to multitask Attention to details Strong organizational and communication skills Flexibility to operate in a fast-paced environment Fluency in Turkish and English At Maersk, youâ€™ll be part of a global team motivated by bringing the world closer. We do this through close partnerships with our valued customers, who trade everything from seafood and fruits, to clothes, electronics and cars! No matter our role in the Region our end goal is to simplify the lives of our customers. This is done through seamless processes, best in class digital solutions, and great customer service! As part of the A.P. Moller-Maersk A/S (APMM) group, we use a global web-based application with servers located abroad to collect and evaluate job applications by our international recruitment teams. To ensure the protection of your personal data in the context of cross-border transfers, we implement the Standard Contractual Clauses issued by the Turkish Personal Data Protection Board and submit the required filings to the Authority. For detailed information regarding our data processing activities, as well as your rights and the relevant privacy notice, you may refer to our Global Data Privacy Statement for Recruiting at https://www.maersk.com/careers/recruitment-process/privacy-statement. Under Article 11 of the Law, you can submit your requests regarding your rights to us via kvkk@maersk.com. For the protection of your personal data, we kindly request that you do not include any special categories of personal data or any personal data unrelated to the evaluation of your job application. Maersk is committed to a diverse and inclusive workplace, and we embrace different styles of thinking. Maersk is an equal opportunities employer and welcomes applicants without regard to race, colour, gender, sex, age, religion, creed, national origin, ancestry, citizenship, marital status, sexual orientation, physical or mental disability, medical condition, pregnancy or parental leave, veteran status, gender identity, genetic information, or any other characteristic protected by applicable law. listings.title: Process Engineer Sulfur Recovery - Fluid Catalytic Cracking (Refinery) - Relocate to Saudi Arabia, Permanent Expat Family Relocation Package
listings.description: Please note that this role is based in Saudi Arabia on a permanent, residential basis. Job Req ID: 17354 Description: Aramco energizes the world economy. Aramco occupies a unique position in the global energy industry. We are the world's largest producer of hydrocarbons (oil and gas), with the lowest upstream carbon intensity of any major producer. With our significant investment in technology and infrastructure, we strive to maximize the value of the energy we produce for the world along with a commitment to enhance Aramcoâ€™s value to society. Headquartered in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, and with offices around the world, we combine market discipline with a generationsâ€™ spanning view of the future, born of our nine decades experience as responsible stewards of the Kingdomâ€™s vast hydrocarbon resources. This responsibility has driven us to deliver significant societal and economic benefits to not just the Kingdom, but also to a vast number of communities, economies, and countries that rely on the vital and reliable energy that we supply. We are one of the most profitable companies in the world, as well as amongst the top five global companies by market capitalization. Overview We are seeking a Process Engineer with extensive hands-on expertise in Sulfur Recovery Unit (SRU) and Sour Water Stripper (SWS) processes to join our Operation Engineering Solutions Department (OESD). OESD's technical team is responsible for providing high-quality, multi-disciplinary support to Global Manufacturing operating facilities (Refineries, NGLF, and petrochemical plants) within the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia and globally. Your primary role is to provide in-depth process engineering and operations expertise to monitor, optimize, and drive performance improvement programs for refineries' SRU & SWS, including remote and on-site technical advisory support, benchmarking, and technology knowledge management. Key Responsibilities As the successful candidate you will be required to perform the following: Conduct regular performance reviews of existing SRU & SWS facilities and analyze KPIs related to operability, profitability, reliability, and process safety. Develop and present quarterly benchmarking reports with actionable improvement recommendations. Provide hands-on support in implementing performance improvement initiatives, demonstrating measurable results in closing identified gaps. Lead benchmarking and best practices exchange workshops among Global Manufacturing facilities, facilitating knowledge sharing and continuous improvement. Develop and distribute bi-monthly SRU & SWS technical best practices bulletins, ensuring knowledge dissemination across Global Manufacturing facilities. Deliver on-demand remote and field technical advisory support, including troubleshooting, start-up/shutdown activities, capacity test runs, and technology pilot testing and provide detailed service reports for each support activity. Collaborate with Global Manufacturing facilities engineers to identify and implement cost optimization and process improvement initiatives, focusing on "low-hanging fruits" that require minimal capital investment. Conduct internal assessments of SRU & SWS process engineering standards, ensuring alignment with Saudi Aramco engineering standards and supporting their implementation across Global Manufacturing facilities. Participate in Business Plan development, coordinating with stakeholders on capital investments for SRU & SWS units and supporting techno-economic evaluations. Evaluate and recommend new SRU & SWS technologies and coordinate with relevant departments for assessment and piloting support. Actively participate in external benchmarking activities with industry bodies such as Japan Cooperation Council Petroleum (JCCP) and Gulf Downstream Association (GDA). Minimum Requirements You will hold a Bachelor's degree in Chemical Engineering or related specialization. An advanced degree is preferred. A minimum of 15 years of total refinery or gas plants process units experience, with at least 10 years of hands-on experience in handling SRUs/TGTU/SWS plants. You will be able to optimize SRU & SWS operations, with specific examples of performance improvements achieved. You will have in-depth knowledge of SRU/TGTU process licensor technologies. You will have a proven track record of conducting technical troubleshooting, start-up, shutdown, and capacity test runs for SRU & SWS units. You will have strong proficiency in data analysis and visualization tools specific to SRU & SWS performance metrics. You will have strong management and coordination skills, with experience in stakeholder management You will also have excellent computer and presentation skills. Working environment Our high-performing employees are drawn by the challenging and rewarding professional, technical and industrial opportunities we offer, and are remunerated accordingly. At Aramco, our people work on truly world-scale projects, supported by investment in capital and technology that is second to none. And because, as a global energy company, we are faced with addressing some of the worldâ€™s biggest technical, logistical and environmental challenges, we invest heavily in talent development. We have a proud history of educating and training our workforce over many decades. Employees at all levels are encouraged to improve their sector-specific knowledge and competencies through our workforce development programs â€“ one of the largest in the world. Show more Show less

listings.title: Project Site Engineer (Located in Liberia)
listings.description: About Us Avesoro is a gold-focused mining company operating in West Africa. We are committed to responsible mining, sustainable development, and creating lasting value in the communities where we operate. We are currently seeking a Project Site Engineer to join our dynamic team in Liberia, supporting the delivery of large-scale infrastructure projects including Tailings Storage Facilities (TSF), water dams (DAM), and water management systems. Key Responsibilities Coordinate engineering and design activities for TSF and DAM projects across all project phases. Review and monitor detailed designs, stability analyses, and technical documentation prepared by engineering consultants. Supervise construction activities including starter walls, sediment ponds, and diversion channels under CQA requirements. Conduct daily site inspections and ensure proper quality control documentation. Support hydrogeological and geotechnical studies, including groundwater monitoring and risk assessments. Monitor installation and performance of piezometers (VWP) and observation wells. Support water balance, flood control, and surface drainage modeling activities. Coordinate contractors, material supply, and on-site logistics to ensure smooth project execution. Monitor technical scope and compliance of contracts and variations with engineering and contractor firms. Prepare technical evaluations, reports, and provide regular updates to the Technical Projects Manager. Support preparation of periodic departmental reports in coordination with relevant stakeholders. Qualifications Education: Bachelorâ€™s degree in Civil Engineering, Geological Engineering, or Environmental Engineering. Background in geotechnics, water structures, or mining infrastructure is preferred. Experience: Minimum 3â€“5 years of experience in dam construction, TSF projects, or mining infrastructure. Experience in both design review and site-based engineering roles is an advantage. Previous experience working with international engineering standards or consultants is preferred. Technical Skills: Proficiency in MS Office and AutoCAD. Knowledge of Civil 3D, GIS, or hydrogeological/hydrological modeling software is an asset. Ability to review and interpret engineering drawings, reports, and calculations. Familiarity with CQA processes, groundwater monitoring systems, and water management models is a plus. Soft Skills: Strong communication and coordination skills with multidisciplinary teams. Analytical thinking and problem-solving abilities. High attention to detail and strong documentation discipline. Ability to work effectively in a dynamic, field-based environment. Additional Requirements: Fluency in English (written and spoken) at a professional/technical level. Willingness to work on-site in remote mining locations. Ability to work in a multicultural and international environment. Show more Show less

listings.description: Founded in 1987, Hayat operates in the fast-moving consumer goods (FMCG) sector, serving millions of consumers globally with 16 powerful brands. Hayatâ€™s portfolio includes Molfix and Bebem Natural in baby care; Molped in feminine care; Joly , Evony , and Goodcare in personal healthcare; Bingo , Gleen , Test , and Has in home care; Papia , Familia , Teno , and Focus in tissue paper; and Sholk in pet care. As the 4th largest branded diaper manufacturer in the world and the leading tissue producer in the Middle East, Eastern Europe, and Africa, Hayat employs over 10.000 people across its operations. Hayat operates 21 production facilities in 8 countries , including Turkey, Egypt, Iran, Algeria, Russia, Nigeria, Pakistan, and Vietnam, and manages sales and distribution companies in Morocco, Bulgaria, Kenya, Thailand, and Malaysia. With its global operations structured under three main regions Eurasia & Americas, Middle East & Africa, and Asia Pacific Hayat reaches over 100 countries across 5 continents, bringing its brands into millions of homes worldwide. listings.title: Revenue Campaign Project Intern (TikTok LIVE) - 2026 Start (BS/MS)
listings.description: Responsibilities Team Description The LIVE Operations team is obsessed with everything to do with TikTok LIVE. From content strategy, monetization, gifting, LIVE features, data analysis, creating campaigns and ensuring a fun and safe space for all of our LIVE users. We are looking for passionate and talented people to join the LIVE Operations team and support in our mission to inspire creativity and bring joy. As a project intern, you will have the opportunity to engage in impactful short-term projects that provide you with a glimpse of professional real-world experience. You will gain practical skills through on-the-job learning in a fast-paced work environment and develop a deeper understanding of your career interests Successful candidates must be able to commit to at least 3 month long internship period. Applications will be reviewed on a rolling basis - we encourage you to apply early. Responsibilities Campaigns Planning and Execution: Configure Revenue campaigns, ensuring alignment with overall strategies and objectives. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to execute campaigns seamlessly. Create basic design assets and materials for promoting campaigns. Budget Management: Assist in the development and management of revenue campaigns budgets. Provide updates on budget status and support recommendations for adjustments. Data Analysis: Collaborate with the Data Analysis team to utilize data analytics for ongoing campaign optimization. Assist in maintaining dashboards and reports for ongoing monitoring of campaign performance. Strategy and Planning: Participate in making quarterly campaign strategies and calendars to drive the growth of key business metrics. Market Analysis: Be familiar with the LIVE ecosystem, analyze revenue strategies and campaigns, regularly conduct competitor research, and explore innovative product features, campaign ideas and gamifications. Qualifications Minimum Qualifications Currently pursuing a Bachelor's degree or above Internship availability to start in January 2026 for at least three months (6 months is preferred) Previous experience of revenue-growth or user-growth role in LIVE streaming industry or gaming industry Strong organizational and multitasking skills, communication skills and data analysis skills High oral and written fluency in English and Turkish. Our team works with stakeholders from both the Middle East, Turkey and globally and will be required to communicate effectively with them Preferred Qualifications Enthusiastic about the gaming and digital entertainment industry is a plus Familiarity with the region and nuances is advantageous is a plus Proficiency in using Office experience is a plus Proficiency in using Figma/Capcut experience is a plus Job Information About TikTok TikTok is the leading destination for short-form mobile video. At TikTok, our mission is to inspire creativity and bring joy. TikTok's global headquarters are in Los Angeles and Singapore, and we also have offices in New York City, London, Dublin, Paris, Berlin, Dubai, Jakarta, Seoul, and Tokyo. Why Join Us Inspiring creativity is at the core of TikTok's mission. Our innovative product is built to help people authentically express themselves, discover and connect â€“ and our global, diverse teams make that possible. Together, we create value for our communities, inspire creativity and bring joy - a mission we work towards every day. We strive to do great things with great people. We lead with curiosity, humility, and a desire to make impact in a rapidly growing tech company. Every challenge is an opportunity to learn and innovate as one team. We're resilient and embrace challenges as they come. By constantly iterating and fostering an "Always Day 1" mindset, we achieve meaningful breakthroughs for ourselves, our company, and our users. When we create and grow together, the possibilities are limitless. Join us. Diversity & Inclusion TikTok is committed to creating an inclusive space where employees are valued for their skills, experiences, and unique perspectives. Our platform connects people from across the globe and so does our workplace. At TikTok, our mission is to inspire creativity and bring joy. To achieve that goal, we are committed to celebrating our diverse voices and to creating an environment that reflects the many communities we reach. We are passionate about this and hope you are too. Show more Show less

listings.title: Brand Manager Vanish & Lysol
listings.description: We are Reckitt Home to the world's best loved and trusted hygiene, health, and nutrition brands. Our purpose defines why we exist: to protect, heal and nurture in the relentless pursuit of a cleaner, healthier world. We are a global team united by this purpose. Join us in our fight to make access to the highest quality hygiene, wellness, and nourishment a right and not a privilege. Marketing Marketing is at the heart of Reckitt. We pride ourselves on our unique way of driving growth for some of the world's most loved and trusted health, hygiene and nutrition brands. Our purpose and fight are what motivates us to design and deliver distinctive communications throughout our consumer funnel, so that we deliver category growth as well as a positive impact on society. With extensive media and digital teams embedded throughout the organisation, we measure both our business and our societal impact. Our global teams lead on our overarching brand strategy, brand guardianship and innovation pipeline in close partnership with R&D. Leaving our local marketing teams to deliver on our regional goals in partnership with our Sales teams. With the scale of our 2500 marketing community - alongside our leading-edge Marketing Academy - your opportunities to grow and upskill will be extensive. About The Role As a Brand Manager at Reckitt you will be responsible driving growth of your brands in your market by leading the execution of the brand marketing for a brand in line with country commercial strategy as set by the Area. As a member of the marketing team, you will be given extensive and diverse responsibilities across the marketing mix and will play a key role in driving the execution of the brand strategy in your market. Be part of a vibrant, diverse team where your passion for brands will lead to meaningful impact and career advancement. Your responsibilities Responsible for the achievement of financial and market share targets for a brand or group of brands inthe market. Work across functions including Area, supply, sales and finance to develop and execute successful commercial plans in order to deliver financial and share plans and targets. Manage initiative development and activation of any local brands in the portfolio including development of new products, consumer and shopper communications. Follow the market dynamics and competition with research reports and prepare analysis based on data. Develop recommendations and action plans accordingly. Generate and propose business development initiatives (BDIs) for the brand(s) based on consumer, shopper and market understanding. Work with Trade Marketing Team as required in the implementation of the store-format activation plans or optimize product assortment and promotional strategy. Responsible for the development of Management Trainee. Work with Sales Team to create customer presentations and meet customer requirements. Devise short- & long-term brand strategy in response to market facts and in line with global brand positioning. Act in accordance with the privacy statement and disciplinary procedure. The experience we're looking for Bachelorâ€™s/masterâ€™s degree in business administration, Economics, Marketing, Industrial Engineering Minimum 4-5 Years Brand Management Experience Gained In FMCG. Fluency in English, both written and spoken The skills for success Consumer Insights, Analytical skills, Presentation skills, Storytelling, Creativity, FMCG/Consumer Health Experience, Adaptability and Innovation, Brand Management. What we offer With inclusion at the heart of everything we do, working alongside our four global Employee Resource Groups, we support our people at every step of their career journey, helping them to succeed in their own individual way. We invest in the wellbeing of our people through parental benefits, an Employee Assistance Program to promote mental health, and life insurance for all employees globally. We have a range of other benefits in line with the local market. Through our global share plans we offer the opportunity to save and share in Reckitt's potential future successes. For eligible roles, we also offer short-term incentives to recognise, appreciate and reward your work for delivering outstanding results. You will be rewarded in line with Reckitt's pay for performance philosophy. Equality We recognise that in real life, great people don't always 'tick all the boxes'. That's why we hire for potential as well as experience. Even if you don't meet every point on the job description, if this role and our company feels like a good fit for you, we still want to hear from you. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to age, disability or medical condition; colour, ethnicity, race, citizenship, and national origin; religion, faith; pregnancy, family status and caring responsibilities; sexual orientation; sex, gender identity, gender expression, and transgender identity; protected veteran status; size or any other basis protected by appropriate law.
