listings.title: CAREER EXPERIENCE DRIVE â€“ FINANCIAL OPERATIONS INTERN
listings.description: VitrA Tiles, which ranks first in exports to the EU, started production in Istanbul Tuzla in 1991 and in Bilecik BozÃ¼yÃ¼k in 1992. VitrA Tiles, which has been producing ceramic tiles in its factory in Russia since 2011, has a total annual production capacity of 30 million square meters. VitrA Tiles products are offered for sale in 75 countries, especially in the Turkish and German markets. VitrA Tiles carries the 60 years of expertise of the VitrA brand to all living spaces in the house, especially the bathroom; It also offers products suitable for use in many different areas such as pools, gardens and exteriors. VitrA Tiles, which constantly develops innovative texture and material solutions, sets the trends in surfaces with its new collections every year. VitrA's tiles with the "TSE Double Star" Certificate also hold the first eco-label given by the European Union to a ceramic brand from Turkey. Our production facility in Bozuyuk has been included in the "Global Lighthouse Network", which the World Economic Forum (WEF) selects as the most advanced production facilities in the world and points out as the "production facility of the future". What Do We Expect From Our New Teammate? Preparation and updating of VAT (Value Added Tax) lists prepared for the tax office, Supporting the organization of documentation related to VAT declarations to ensure tax compliance, and submitting them to relevant authorities when necessary, Recording and updating data related to export-registered sales, Collaborating with exporting companies for the preparation and follow-up of customs declarations, Regular review of invoices, payments, and supplier reconciliations. You are exactly the person we are looking for! Your team is waiting for you! What kind of teammate are we looking for? If you are a 3rd-year student in a relevant undergraduate program, If you have a good command of English, If you can use MS Office programs efficiently, If you are available to participate in a long-term internship at least three days a week, If you are interested in the field of finance, If you are a team player with a solution-oriented mindset, If you are proactive, result-oriented, and have strong time management skills, If you enjoy taking responsibility and are eager to learn. Â«You should live your career, development, life and future at EczacÄ±baÅŸÄ±!Â» What do we offer to you? You can constantly improve your personal, professional and technical competencies and participate in our training programs that will support you and your career. Global opportunities and rotation opportunities in more than 120 international markets among more than 40 organizations can always knock on your door. At EczacÄ±baÅŸÄ±, leaves are calculated according to the person's seniority based on the person's total working experience. Your leave comes with you. We always applaud success with different reward methods. You can benefit from location-independent or hybrid working opportunities with working models that vary according to the nature of your job, and you can determine your own work schedule with flexible working hours. We offer a technology and ergonomics support package to EczacÄ±baÅŸÄ± employees who work remotely full-time. It is privileged to be a mother and father at EczacÄ±baÅŸÄ±. At EczacÄ±baÅŸÄ±, our employees who are mothers are provided with monthly nursery allowance and our employees who are fathers are entitled to 3 weeks of paternity leave. We are committed to providing equal opportunity in employment. We value diversity and do not discriminate based on race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, or veteran status. #WeDoNotDifferentiateBetweenJobsForWomenAndMen Show more Show less

listings.title: Quality System Management Trainee
listings.description: About Us PHINIA: Advancing sustainability today, powering a cleaner tomorrow. PHINIA is an independent, market-leading, premium solutions and components provider with over 100 years of manufacturing expertise and industry relationships, with a strong brand portfolio that includes DELPHIÂ®, DELCO REMYÂ® and HARTRIDGEâ„¢. With over 12,500 employees across 43 locations in 20 countries, PHINIA is headquartered in Auburn Hills, Michigan, USA. At PHINIA, we Provide fuel systems, electrical systems, and aftermarket products and solutions of the highest quality â€” developed and manufactured responsibly â€” that are designed to enhance efficiency and reduce the environmental impact of vehicles, industrial machinery, and other applications. In doing so, we contribute to a cleaner tomorrow, treat our people and surrounding communities with respect, and hold ourselves accountable to robust ethical standards. Our Culture PHINIA promotes and cultivates an inclusive culture and diverse perspectives, strives to maintain its reputation for excellence, thrives on the power of collaboration, and fosters the development of our talented employees. We believe in making a positive impact through our business and actions, and we take our collective responsibility seriously. Career Opportunities We believe in building a brighter tomorrow for our employees as well as our customers and encourage you to learn about our long history, strong culture, new technologies, and future vision. We offer a strong local presence and interesting global opportunities. Join us on this shared journey toward a brighter tomorrow. Job Purpose PHINIA is looking for a â€œManagement Traineeâ€ to work at its plant in Izmir for the Quality Department. Join us on this shared journey toward a brighter tomorrow! Key Responsibilities Graduating from the industrial, mechanical engineering department, etc. Fluency in English MS Office proficiency Strong problem-solving and analytical capabilities Strong communication skills Passionate to learn and eager to take initiative Quality Core Tools information is a plus What We Offer We provide compensation and benefits programs intended to attract, motivate, reward, and retain an incredibly talented, globally diverse workforce at all levels within our organization. Our compensation programs are informed by market data and business needs, and we are committed to providing equitable and competitive compensation. We are committed to providing our team with quality and competitive benefit programs, including health and well-being resources, family-centric policies, and an agile workplace program, where not precluded by collective bargaining agreements or national statutory plans. Plans are benchmarked for competitiveness and value. We provide formal development opportunities at all levels and stages of employee careers. These opportunities are delivered in a variety of formats to make our portfolio of solutions agile, sustainable, and scalable to support our employees in developing the skills needed to succeed. What We Believe Product Leadership - Innovation that brings value to our customers Humility - Seeking out diverse perspectives and working collaboratively Inclusivity - Recognizing our differences makes us stronger; we are bold and intentional Net-Zero - Committed to energy efficiency, waste reduction and beneficial reuse Integrity - Taking responsibility for our decisions and doing what is right Accountability - Taking ownership of our actions and driving results SAFETY You will consistently hear us say Safety First! We are committed to continually improving our strong safety performance supporting the health and wellness of our employees! We also believe employee health and safety is everyoneâ€™s responsibility. We encourage safety learning and collaboration to help employees understand and follow applicable safety policies, standards, and procedures and identify opportunities to minimize or eliminate risk. Work is expected to be conducted in a manner that stresses the importance of preventing incidents and illnesses, including attending all required safety meetings and trainings. It is expected that all incidents, near misses, and unsafe conditions are immediately reported to the direct manager, Human Resources, or Safety Representative. EQUAL EMPLOYMENT OPPORTUNITY PHINIA is an equal employment opportunity employer such that all qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, age, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity/expression, national origin, disability or protected veteran status. VISA SPONSORSHIP PHINIA does provide sponsorship for employment visa status based on business need. However, for this role, applicants must be currently authorized to work on a full-time basis, in the country where the position is currently based. NO UNAUTHORIZED REFERRALS FROM RECRUITERS & VENDORS Please note that PHINIA does not seek or accept unsolicited resumes or offers from third party recruiters or staffing agencies associated with any published or unpublished employment opportunities. Any unsolicited information sent to PHINIA will be considered as unencumbered and free from any fee or charge whatsoever. Only members of our Human Resources Team have the authority to engage or authorize recruiting services, which must be agreed upon before the unsolicited resume or offer is received. GLOBAL TERMS OF USE AND PRIVACY STATEMENT Carefully read the PHINIA Privacy Policy before using this website. Your ability to access and use this website and apply for a job at PHINIA are conditioned on your acceptance and compliance with these terms. Please access the linked document by clicking here, select the geographical area where you are applying for employment, and review. Before submitting your application you will be asked to confirm your agreement with the terms. Career Scam Disclaimer: PHINIA makes no representations or guarantees regarding employment opportunities listed on any third-party website. To protect against career scams, job applicants should take the necessary precautions when interviewing for and accepting employment positions allegedly offered by PHINIA. Applicants should never provide their national ID numbers, birth dates, credit card numbers, bank account information or other private information when communicating with prospective employers or responding to employment opportunities online. Job applicants are invited to contact PHINIA through PHINIAâ€™s website to verify the authenticity of any employment opportunities. Advancing sustainability today, powering a cleaner tomorrow. Join us on this shared journey to a brighter tomorrow. For more information about PHINIA, please visit www.phinia.com. Show more Show less

listings.title: Agency Operations Project Intern (TTLIVE-MENAT) - 2026 Start (BS/MS)
listings.description: Responsibilities We are the Agency Operations Team, focusing on the construction and growth of the TikTok LIVE Agency Ecosystem. We are mainly responsible for Agency Recruitment and Incubation, helping the high-quality development of live streaming business. As a project intern, you will have the opportunity to engage in impactful short-term projects that provide you with a glimpse of professional real-world experience. You will gain practical skills through on-the-job learning in a fast-paced work environment and develop a deeper understanding of your career interests. Applications will be reviewed on a rolling basis - we encourage you to apply early. Responsibilities: Support offline and online recruitment events, sort out agency resources, follow up on the progress of connections and complete recruitment-related follow up. Be responsible for new Agency Education-related work, including the creation of educational materials (manuals, PPT, etc.), online/offline meeting presentations, and daily agency Q&A, to help new Agencies get started with the business quickly; Assist AM (Account Manager) in incubating potential agencies, follow up on the growth progress and monitor agency's task completion rate. Be responsible for data analysis related to recruitment and operations, statistics of core data such as agency recruitment conversion rate, education completion rate, and incubation effect, and output basic analysis reports to support business optimization; Cooperate with the team to complete other daily agency operation-related work to ensure the efficient implementation of various businesses. Qualifications Minimum Qualifications Currently pursuing a bachelor's degree or above, major is not limited; able to commit to at least 4 working days per week for an internship period of 3 months or more (6 months is preferred) High level of fluency in Turkish and English Strong interest in the Internet industry, live streaming field (TikTok LIVE is preferred) and agency operations Good data analysis and summary capabilities, proficient in using Excel for data statistics and basic analysis, able to quickly sort out business problems and judge priorities Proficient in using Office software (Word, PPT), with basic copywriting and material creation capabilities Strong communication, coordination, negotiation and learning abilities, serious and responsible at work, with good team spirit and execution Preferred Qualifications Internship experience in Agency operations, channel recruitment or user operations is preferred; Familiarity with the Turkish live streaming market and local agency characteristics is preferred; Experience in data analysis, ability to independently output simple analysis reports and possess certain business insight capabilities is preferred. Proficiency in tools such as PS and Figma is a plus Job Information About TikTok TikTok is the leading destination for short-form mobile video. At TikTok, our mission is to inspire creativity and bring joy. TikTok's global headquarters are in Los Angeles and Singapore, and we also have offices in New York City, London, Dublin, Paris, Berlin, Dubai, Jakarta, Seoul, and Tokyo. Why Join Us Inspiring creativity is at the core of TikTok's mission. Our innovative product is built to help people authentically express themselves, discover and connect â€“ and our global, diverse teams make that possible. Together, we create value for our communities, inspire creativity and bring joy - a mission we work towards every day. We strive to do great things with great people. We lead with curiosity, humility, and a desire to make impact in a rapidly growing tech company. Every challenge is an opportunity to learn and innovate as one team. We're resilient and embrace challenges as they come. By constantly iterating and fostering an "Always Day 1" mindset, we achieve meaningful breakthroughs for ourselves, our company, and our users. When we create and grow together, the possibilities are limitless. Join us. Diversity & Inclusion TikTok is committed to creating an inclusive space where employees are valued for their skills, experiences, and unique perspectives. Our platform connects people from across the globe and so does our workplace. At TikTok, our mission is to inspire creativity and bring joy. To achieve that goal, we are committed to celebrating our diverse voices and to creating an environment that reflects the many communities we reach. We are passionate about this and hope you are too. Show more Show less

listings.title: People & Culture Intern (Long-Term)
listings.description: Founded in Belgium in 1961, Ravago is a prominent global brand with operations in over 60 countries, more than 325 locations, and over 10,000 employees serving over 56,000 customers. Ravago continues to make a global impact within Europe, North America, Asia, and Africa. Guided by our mission to â€œto be at the heart of your life,â€ we are committed to growing and strengthening our presence every day, upholding our values of entrepreneurship, professionalism, humility, and human-focus. Ravago Turkey, headquartered in AtaÅŸehir, operates with over 1,600 employees across 16 locations throughout Turkey. One of the largest petrochemical producers in Turkey, we aim to meet special product demands that are not available in the market with our extensive product range and R&D efforts. We are not only one of the top industrial enterprises but are also a preferred brand in more than 50 countries where we export our products. We are looking for a Long-Term Intern â€“ People & Culture to join Ravago TÃ¼rkiye at our AtaÅŸehir office . Desired Qualifications: Currently enrolled as an undergraduate student at a university Mandatory internship insurance provided by the university Able to attend the internship at least 3 - 4 days per week Proficiency in MS Office programs Strong communication skills, analytical thinking ability, and a team-oriented mindset Eager to learn and open to personal and professional development What We Expect from You: Support daily operational tasks within the People & Culture (HR) Department Assist in recruitment processes , including job posting follow-ups, candidate communication, and interview scheduling Support training and development processes , including entering and tracking training records in relevant systems Assist in the coordination of training activities and maintain related documentation Collaborate with team members and support ongoing HR projects and initiatives Additional Information: This position is for a long-term internship opportunity within the People & Culture Department . Interviews will be conducted online. Only candidates whose internship insurance is covered by their university and who meet the requirements will be evaluated. Show more Show less

listings.description: General Qualifications Those who study or graduate from the Marine Engineering, Maritime Transportation Management Engineering, Mechanical or Naval Engineering departments of universities, Those who have good knowledge of English and MS Office, Job Description Keeping track of ships' data such as speed and fuel consumption and providing support to the Ship Performance Specialist, Conducting sectoral analysis on planning, simplification and digitalization for the efficiency of ship operations, Following the regulations of organizations such as the EU & IMO and reporting changes, Show more Show less

listings.title: Monetization Intern
listings.description: Lucida AI is a fast-growing AI startup building speech-based AI learning and conversational applications used by millions of users globally. We are looking for a Monetization Intern who wants to learn how subscription and in-app purchase monetization works at scale and help optimize revenue across our mobile apps. This role is highly hands-on and ideal for candidates who are curious about subscriptions, paywalls, pricing experiments, and gamification-driven monetization . What You'll Do Support optimization of in-app purchases, subscriptions, and offer structures (weekly, monthly, yearly plans, trials, intro offers). Help design monetization mechanics connected to gamification features (rewards, streaks, unlockable premium features). Assist in analyzing paywall and purchase funnel performance (conversion, trial activation, renewal). Support execution of A/B tests on pricing, bundles, messaging, and paywall layouts. Track key monetization metrics such as conversion rate, ARPU, retention, and churn. Research competitor monetization strategies and summarize insights. Work closely with Product, Growth, and Design teams to improve revenue performance. Requirements 3rd or 4th year university student or recent graduate (Engineering, Economics, Business, or related fields). Strong interest in mobile apps, monetization, pricing, or growth. Analytical mindset and comfort working with data (Excel / Sheets preferred). Curiosity about subscription business models and experimentation. Fluent English communication skills. Able to work full-time internship (3-6 months) Benefits Work directly on real monetization decisions impacting millions of users globally. Learn how leading mobile AI apps optimize subscriptions, paywalls, and LTV. Fast-learning startup environment with real ownership from day one. Opportunity to transition into a full-time Monetization / Growth role after the internship. Show more Show less

listings.title: Web Internship Opportunity for 4th Year Students
listings.description: Overview Are you a motivated and ambitious student eager to gain long-term, hands-on experience in software development? We are looking for talented and enthusiastic 4th-year engineering or computer science students who are passionate about honing their skills in Angular. As a long-term intern at our company, you will have the chance to work on real-world projects, contribute to product development, and gain valuable insights into various aspects of the software development lifecycle. If you're ready to take the next step in your career and commit to an extended internship experience, we encourage you to apply today! Responsibilities Collaborate with the development team to design, develop, and maintain web applications. Write clean, efficient, and well-documented code using Angular. Participate in code reviews and contribute to improving code quality. Assist in troubleshooting, debugging, and optimizing application performance. Research and implement new technologies to enhance our products and processes. Requirements Currently enrolled as a 4th-year student in Computer Engineering, Software Engineering, or a related field. Basic knowledge of Angular (academic or personal projects are acceptable). Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail. Good communication skills and ability to work in a team. (Nice to have) Familiarity with C#. Who We Are We are a global technology company, developing AI-powered conversational solutions that empower organizations to be data-driven, enhance efficiency, and offer superior customer experiences. We are an R&D center and our solutions are developed by a team of over 100 engineers specializing in text-to-speech, speech recognition, natural language processing, and voice biometrics technologies. As of 2022 we are a part of Unifonic, a leading Communications Platform as a Service (CPaaS) provider, we have grown into an international organization with over 500 dynamic team members. We have a customer base of 500 enterprises across 20 countries in the US, EU and MENA regions. At Sestek, we believe in the power of diversity, and inclusive organizational culture. All candidates are considered equally regardless of their race, religion, color, age, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, national or ethnic origin, marital status, family status, disability, genetic characteristics. If you would like to know more about our culture, please feel free to visit our LinkedIn Page. Show more Show less

listings.title: Taste the Future - Long-Term Internship in Quality Assurance
listings.description: Job Description Are You Ready to Make It Happen at MondelÄ“z International? Join our Mission to Lead the Future of Snacking. Make It Matter. As an organization we are committed to developing the next generation of Makers and Bakers. Joining us at an early career stage in our fast paced and ever changing environment will enable you to do more, learn more and grow more. You will be encouraged to step outside your comfort zoneâ€“ you may even surprise yourself! We will ensure you are given the support you need to be at your best and enable you to be yourself and bring passion and personality. Here you can lean in and speak up and bring your own flavor. More About This Role What you need to know about this position: You will gain experience in maintenance, quality or production in one of our Gebze plants (Gum & Candy or Bakery), You will receive a structured onboarding and mentoring process, You will get exposure to real-world engineering projects in a modern manufacturing environment. You will be a part of a dynamic and supportive team culture focused on continuous improvement and innovation. What extra ingredients you will bring: Having a unique perspective, Strong willingness to learn, grow, and face technical challenges, Proactive mindset with the ability to work both independently and in a team, Languages: English & local language Strong collaboration and relationship management skills, 3rd or final-year students in Chemical, Food, Mechanical, Electric-Electronical or Mechatronic Engineering. You have a GPA above 3.00. Job specific requirements: You are able to continue your internship between February and June, 3 days a week, You are eligible to be an long term intern (at least 13-14 weeks) and your university is sponsoring your insurance. Relocation Support Available? No Relocation support available Business Unit Summary We value our talented employees, and whenever possible strive to help one of our associates grow professionally before recruiting new talent to our open positions. If you think the open position you see is right for you, we encourage you to apply! Our people make all the difference in our succes MondelÄ“z International is an equal opportunity employer and all qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, gender, sexual orientation or preference, gender identity, national origin, disability status, protected veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law. Excited to grow your career? We value our talented employees, and whenever possible strive to help one of our associates grow professionally before recruiting new talent to our open positions. If you think the open position you see is right for you, we encourage you to apply! IF YOU REQUIRE SUPPORT TO COMPLETE YOUR APPLICATION OR DURING THE INTERVIEW PROCESS, PLEASE CONTACT THE RECRUITER Job Type Intern (Fixed Term) Interns Early Careers Show more Show less

listings.title: Summer Intern, Art
listings.description: Attention all aspiring undergraduate Art Students! Are you excited about the idea of exploring a vibrant and colorful world of gaming? Sounds like a blast, doesn't it? If you answered yes, then we have the perfect opportunity for you! Join our Art Internship program and spend two months in our office to get a taste of our working environment and get ready to level up your skills! Our internship program will give you a unique opportunity to put your skills to the table and dive into the end-to-end visual development cycle. You will gain practical experience in the creative pipeline while learning proven techniques from professionals. Illustration Intern creates concepts and support the team with illustrations that meet the requirements of the production 3D Art Intern takes concepts and recreates them into the final production in line with Peakâ€™s art style 2D Animation Intern contributes to the project with engaging and captivating animations, making it come to life Hereâ€™s what youâ€™ll do Participate in various projects to demonstrate and improve your skills Experiment with dummy trials for the in-game item and asset animations Collaborate with the team to understand and address feedback for iterations Implement creative art solutions Keep up-to-date with the latest industry trends and techniques, and experiment with different styles What weâ€™re looking for Be enrolled in 3rd or 4th year of university preferably in Fine Art, or a related field Have a schedule that allows you to work full-time in the Peak office for 2 months during the summer of 2026 Have a passion for the cartoon art style Familiarity with digital visualization tools (i.e. Photoshop, Illustrator, Maya, Blender, Spine, After Effects) Enthusiastic approach to learning new techniques and practicing them Application and Hiring Process We encourage you to select the internship opportunity that best matches your interests. Your application will be evaluated based on your choice. We'd love to see examples of your skills! We will consider applications that include a portfolio showcasing your skill set. It may include school assignments or personal projects. Make sure your portfolio is well-organized and emphasizes the skills that would make you a great fit for the internship position you're interested in Share your portfolio as an online link Ensure your documents are up to 100 MB For showcasing 3D works, an image-based portfolio would suffice Once your application and portfolio have been reviewed and selected for the next stage, you'll have an online interview with our HR team and Art Team. The internship period will be between July 1st and August 28th, 2026. Last day to apply is March 22nd. We hope to hear from you soon! Show more Show less

listings.title: Alumil NextGen Internship Program: Launch Your Career with Alumil
listings.description: Alumil NextGen is an internship program offering university students who are goal-oriented, eager to learn, and development-focused the opportunity to make a strong start to their careers. Through this program, participants gain real-world professional experience in a dynamic manufacturing and corporate environment across various departments, including Engineering, Architecture, Marketing, Human Resources, Logistics, Finance, and Sales . Throughout the program, students will become part of a team that develops innovative solutions for the construction industry, discover themselves with mentorship support , and expand their professional network . As a NextGen Intern, you will... Make an Impact You will contribute to Alumil Ege's business objectives by taking part in real business projects, and directly assume a role in tasks such as analysis, design, and process support. Gain Valuable Skills You will enhance both your technical and soft skills through hands-on learning and training sessions, strengthening areas like problem-solving, communication, teamwork, and project ownership . Build Your Professional Network You will connect with professionals from different departments and participate in team events, workshops, and company organizations. Learn from Your Mentors You will be paired with an experienced mentor who will guide you, support your development, and help you shape your career goals. Experience Different Fields You will gain insight into the various functions of our organization, discovering how interdepartmental collaboration works and how shared success is achieved. Innovate and Grow We encourage you to think creatively, share your ideas, and develop new approaches. Innovation starts with curiosity, and innovation drives progressâ€”your perspective is important to us. Job Description: Project Participation: Actively participate in real-world business projects and assignments, including tasks such as analysis, design, process improvement, and operational support Business Enhancement: Contribute to the development of innovative solutions for the construction industry with creative ideas and approaches Process Support: Fulfill supporting duties that help the assigned department's daily workflow and aid in achieving business goals Learning and Development: Attend technical and soft-skill training sessions, workshops, and internal company organizations offered throughout the program Communication and Collaboration: Communicate effectively with professionals from various departments and participate in cross-functional collaboration projects Mentorship: Seek guidance from the assigned mentor, establish and follow personal development goals based on regular feedback Requirements Must be a final-year student in an undergraduate or graduate program, OR a recent graduate who has graduated no more than 2 years ago . Must be studying/have graduated from one of the following or related disciplines: Engineering (Mechanical, Civil, Industrial, etc.) Architecture Business Administration / Economics Marketing / Communications Logistics / Supply Chain Human Resources Benefits Financial Terms: The NextGen Internship Program offers a paid internship opportunity . Interns will be subject to the company's established compensation policies for the duration of their tenure. Social Advantages: Our interns are entitled to full access to all social rights and benefits offered to Alumil employees throughout the program (e.g., meal services, transportation etc.). At ALUMIL we are building excellence every day. Alumil has more than 30 years of experience in the production of architectural aluminium systems and 3.000 employees. We are one of the most advanced companies globally owning state-of-the art production lines in our 12 factories in Europe. Alumil, is a family-owned business that also embraces all of its employees like family. Our culture's primary focus is on integrity, team spirit, initiative, loyalty and "meraki" (spirited work). ALUMIL opposes any discrimination, unequal treatment and violation of human rights and ensures the provision of equal opportunities at work. When hiring and evaluating employees, it does not discriminate based on race, gender, religion, age, disability, sexual orientation, nationality, political beliefs or social status. Show more Show less

listings.title: Future Commencer Summer Internship Program
listings.description: Are you ready to be a Future Commencer? At Commencis, we create an inspiring and tangible vision for leading brandsâ€™ digital platforms and customer experiences. Gain real-world experience, work on innovative projects, and launch your tech career with Commencis! Weâ€™re inviting 3rd and 4th-year students to apply for exciting internships in Engineering , Product , QA, R&D, Cloud and AI teams through the Future Commencer Summer Internship Program â€” part of the Commencis Tech Academy. During the 6-week internship, youâ€™ll have a supportive mentor to guide you, as hands-on projects help you transform your academic knowledge into practical skills. If you want to gain real experience while discovering what itâ€™s like to be a Commencer, apply now! Location: Istanbul Internship Dates: July 20 â€“ August 28, 2026 What Youâ€™ll Do: -Work closely with mentors to understand design processes and technological developments. -Contribute to projects across mobile software development, web front-end, and server-side development. -Take part in daily team meetings and collaborate on a variety of tech and design challenges. -At the end of the program, deliver a comprehensive case study of your internship experience. Who Weâ€™re Looking For: -3rd-year or 4th-year university students majoring in Computer Engineering or a related field. -Passionate about mobile technologies , emerging tech trends , and coding the future . -Interested in mobile software development , web front-end , and server-side development . -Dream of working with an agile , curious , and international team . -Demonstrate strong teamwork , leadership skills , and creativity . -Proficient in programming languages such as Java , Kotlin , Swift , React , or similar. Apply via LinkedIn or send your resume to hr@commencis.com . Join our journey to the future now! Applications will close on March 27th. Why Commencis? We want people to thrive at Commencis. Hereâ€™s what Commencers like about working here: Competitive Compensation & Benefits: We offer a competitive salary, private health insurance, pension and retirement plans through a company-backed pension system, meal card, commute compensation, work-from home support and paid birthday off. Happier Weekdays: We offer flexible working hours including remote working option. Online events, guest speakers, refreshments in the office, meeting-light culture, and many more to enjoy the weekdays. Never Stop Learning: We support learning and development programs for almost anything. Additionally, we provide access to leading online e-learning platforms like Udemy and various libraries. Community & Socials: We are a tight-knit community that loves gathering. Our social activities include happy hours, workshops, new year party, breakfast & lunch get-togethers, movie nights, and our Summer Festival. Open Culture: We maintain a flat organizational structure with a culture of direct and open communication. We value Commencersâ€™ voices and address any suggestions and questions you may have. About Commencis Join us in paving the way for a thriving digital society! Commencis has more than two decades of expertise in the world of experience design, software engineering and cloud technologies. Our products and solutions are used by leading brands in financial services, insurance, airlines and retail in more than 20 countries. We help our clients around the globe to commence their next evolution and pave the way for a thriving digital society. We love discovering whatâ€™s next. We value collaboration, curiosity, and an open mindset at work. If you share the same passion with our fellow Commencers, then let us unleash your world-class potential! We will process your personal data as part of our recruitment procedures. To find out more, please consult our Candidate Privacy Notices We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us. Show more Show less

listings.title: First Gen Summer Intern - Global Procurement
listings.description: Overview At PepsiCo, youâ€™ll discover a place where our mission is to create smiles around the world. With a portfolio of more than 500 beloved brands including, Pepsi, Doritos and Lipton Ice Tea, our work touches millions of people every day. At the heart of the company is a team of thinkers, creators, and problem-solvers who collaborate to innovate and turn ideas into action. Driven by innovation and a focus on creating joyful moments through food and drinks, our decisions are guided by consumer centricity, creating opportunities for our associates to do meaningful work and make a lasting impact in the communities we serve. Whatever your role, youâ€™ll be part of a global community that values your ideas and empowers you to make an impact, on your career and on the world around you. First Gen is a two-month summer internship program, offering hands-on experience, dynamic learning and exciting networking opportunities. We are looking for a First Gen Summer Intern to join our Global Procurement team based in Ä°stanbul . Our process consists of the following steps: Application: 13 March - 1 April Video Interview: 3 - 9 April Face-to-Face Assessment: 27 April - 12 May Internship: 1 July - 31 August Responsibilities Track procurement requests (PR/PO) and prepare related reports Monitor purchasing processes and ensure timely follow-up Communicate with newly registered and existing suppliers Collect and process supplier documentation Maintain and update supplier data in internal systems and Excel Verify supplier information and ensure data accuracy Prepare procurement-related reports Collect and analyze spend data using Excel / Power BI Support basic spend and performance analyses Maintain organized procurement documentation Support process improvement and documentation updates Contribute to purchasing team projects (process optimization, digitalization initiatives, etc.) Support cross-functional communication when required Qualifications 3rd or 4th year undergraduate student who have completed at least their 2nd year Fluent in both English and Turkish Available to work full-time in Ä°stanbul between July 1 â€“ August 31 Proficient in MS Office programs Highly motivated to learn, develop new skills, and grow in a dynamic environment Strong collaboration and communication skills Show more Show less

listings.title: Marketing Long-Term Intern (Doritos) - (Full-Time)
listings.description: Overview At PepsiCo, youâ€™ll discover a place where our mission is to create smiles around the world. With a portfolio of more than 500 beloved brands including, Pepsi, Layâ€™s and Lipton Ice Tea, our work touches millions of people every day. At the heart of the company is a team of thinkers, creators, and problem-solvers who collaborate to innovate and turn ideas into action. Driven by innovation and a focus on creating joyful moments through food and drinks, our decisions are guided by consumer centricity, creating opportunities for our associates to do meaningful work and make a lasting impact in the communities we serve. Whatever your role, youâ€™ll be part of a global community that values your ideas and empowers you to make an impact, on your career and on the world around you. We are looking for a highly motivated Marketing Long-Term Intern (Doritos) to join our team in Ä°stanbul. This internship offers the opportunity to gain hands-on experience in brand management, campaign execution, and market analysis within one of the world's leading FMCG companies. The selected candidate will support cross-functional teams and contribute to impactful projects that drive growth across our Snacks portfolio. Responsibilities Assist brand managers in the execution of marketing plans Support in the development and implementation of ATL & BTL campaigns, including TV, digital, influencer, OOH, shopper marketing, and experiential activations Contribute to NPD (New Product Development) launches by supporting packaging design, naming, and activation ideas Support the creation of engaging content across social platforms (TikTok, Instagram, YouTube) and monitor brand presence online Collaborate with cross-functional teams Conduct desk research and analyze market/consumer insights to support decision-making Assist in day-to-day operations and coordination of internal processes Qualifications Preferably 4th year undergraduate student Available to work full-time for 5 days a week Fluent in English and Turkish Able to understand and interpret data Knowledge in MS Office applications Passionate about marketing and working in FMCG sector A team player with curiosity, creativity, and a growth mindset Analytical, result oriented and eager to learn Good and effective communication skills Highly self-motivated, flexible and energetic Show more Show less

listings.title: Internship-Summer Trainee
listings.description: Yokogawa, award winner for â€˜Best Asset Monitoring Technologyâ€™ and â€˜Best Digital Twin Technologyâ€™ at the HP Awards, is a leading provider of industrial automation, test and measurement, information systems and industrial services in several industries. Our aim is to shape a better future for our planet through supporting the energy transition, (bio)technology, artificial intelligence, industrial cybersecurity, etc. We are committed to the United Nations sustainable development goals by utilizing our ability to measure and connect. Around 18 000 employees work on all five continents with one corporate mission, to â€œco-innovate tomorrowâ€. We are looking for a dynamic colleague who shares our passion for technology and cares for our planet. In return we offer great opportunities to grow yourself in a truly global enterprise where respect, value creation, collaboration, integrity, taking care of each other, and gratitude is highly valued. We are looking for talented university students to join us as a "Long-Term Intern" within Operations and Sales Department. What You Will Bring To Us Students must be insured by the university. The applications of the senior students (3rd and 4th grade) in Electric&Electronic, Chemical and Control&Automation Engineering disciplines will be evaluated. Candidates will not be taken into consideration who do not speak fluent or mother tongue Turkish. Excellent communication skills in English. Important for us For Yokogawa diversity and inclusion is not just a human resources initiative or social to-do. It is something that we strongly believe and promote. We aim to recruit talent who dare to bring change to our organization with a diverse mindset and refreshing new views. Yokogawa wants a Diverse, Equitable, and Inclusive culture. We will actively recruit, develop, and promote people from a variety of backgrounds who differ in terms of experience, knowledge, thinking styles, perspective, cultural background, and socioeconomic status. We will not discriminate based on any categorization of humankind. Yokogawa values differences and enables everyone to belong, contribute, succeed, and demonstrate their full potential. Not just a job, but a career Yokogawa, award winner for â€˜Best Asset Monitoring Technologyâ€™ and â€˜Best Digital Twin Technologyâ€™ at the HP Awards, is a leading provider of industrial automation, test and measurement, information systems and industrial services in several industries. Our aim is to shape a better future for our planet through supporting the energy transition, (bio)technology, artificial intelligence, industrial cybersecurity, etc. We are committed to the United Nations sustainable development goals by utilizing our ability to measure and connect. About The Team Our 18,000 employees work in over 60 countries with one corporate mission, to "co-innovate tomorrow". We are looking for dynamic colleagues who share our passion for technology and care for our planet. In return, we offer you great career opportunities to grow yourself in a truly global culture where respect, value creation, collaboration, integrity, and gratitude are highly valued and exhibited in everything we do. Diverse, Equitable & Inclusive culture Yokogawa is an Equal Opportunity Employer. Yokogawa wants a diverse, equitable and inclusive culture. We will actively recruit, develop, and promote people from a variety of backgrounds who differ in terms of experience, knowledge, thinking styles, perspective, cultural background, and socioeconomic status. We will not discriminate based on race, skin color, age, sex, gender identity and expression, sexual orientation, religion, belief, political opinion, nationality, ethnicity, place of origin, disability, family relations or any other circumstances. Yokogawa values differences and enables everyone to belong, contribute, succeed, and demonstrate their full potential. Are you being referred to one of our roles?
